notes: Fixes multi-device USB lockups (leaked pollers + enumeration stall), safer preset import, and rejects corrupt/incomplete firmware downloads.

versions.notes: Beta: advanced target setting (auto-adjust an in-game setting to a target) + versioned updates (version dropdown, rollback, per-section beta channel). The advanced-target feature needs 3.0.34-beta firmware.
Fixes multi-device USB lockups (leaked pollers + enumeration stall), safer preset import, and rejects corrupt/incomplete firmware downloads.
